The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/home/brunolinux/projects/sovalereclamar.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: svrtech
service: so-vale-reclamar-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1 
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  environment:
    BUCKET_NAME: ${self:custom.bucketName}
    DATABASE_URL: ${ssm:/sovalereclamar/prod/database-url}

custom:
  bucketName: sovalereclamar-fotos-bruno-dev-${self:provider.stage}

resources:
  Resources:
    
    UploadsBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:custom.bucketName}
        CorsConfiguration:
          CorsRules:
            - AllowedMethods: [PUT, POST, GET]
              AllowedOrigins: ['*'] 
              AllowedHeaders: ['*']

    CognitoUserPool:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
      Properties:
        UserPoolName: SoValeReclamarUsers-${self:provider.stage}
        UsernameAttributes:
          - email
        AutoVerifiedAttributes:
          - email
        Policies:
          PasswordPolicy:
            MinimumLength: 8
            RequireLowercase: true
            RequireNumbers: true
            RequireSymbols: false
            RequireUppercase: false

    CognitoUserPoolClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: SoValeReclamarIonicApp
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        GenerateSecret: false
        
functions:
  createComplaint:
    handler: src/functions/complaints/create.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /complaints
          method: POST
  
  searchEntities:
    handler: src/functions/entities/search.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /entities/search
          method: GET
